Author: Josh
UsageNotes: Instead of scrapping TrackingEntity, move the TrackingEntity to a non-stock location.
ImplementationNotes: The Post Deploy script will insert a non-stock Location called SCRAP that will be used to move the stock into, please review this location after deploy and ensure the location is setup correctly.
Name: SOFT_SCRAP
Description:
SOFT_SCRAP

Instead of scrapping TrackingEntity, move the TrackingEntity to a non-stock location.

The Post Deploy script will insert a non-stock Location called SCRAP that will be used to move the stock into, please review this location after deploy and ensure the location is setup correctly.
